dazzle.def: 使眼花、使驚羨的人物、耀眼的人的人人物 (單數) (眩)
dazzle.ex: The_bright sun began to dazzle me.

dazzled.def: 眼花的、驚羨的人的人 (或物) (眩)
dazzled.ex: He was dazzled by her extreme beauty.

dazzler.def: 令人讚嘆的人或物人物 (單數) (讚)
dazzler.ex: That new sports car is a real dazzler.

dazzling.def: 耀眼的、令人眼花繚亂的人 (或物) (耀)
dazzling.ex: She gave him a very dazzling smile.

deacon.def: 執事、助祭的人物、款待的人的人人物 (單數) (執)
deacon.ex: He has been a church deacon for years.

dead.def: 死的、無感覺的、完全地的人物、死者的人的人人物 (單數) (死)
dead.col: dead end, dead language, drop dead, stone dead
dead.ex: The_car battery is completely dead now.

deadbeat.def: 窮光蛋、懶漢、筋疲力盡的的人的人物 (窮)
deadbeat.ex: He is a lazy deadbeat and owes money.

deaden.def: 使減弱、使麻木、消除的人的人
deaden.ex: They gave him drugs to deaden pain.

deadfall.def: 落木捕機、倒下的樹木人物 (單數) (陷)
deadfall.ex: They set a heavy deadfall for the_bear.

deadhead.def: 免費入場者、(空)空載的人物、剪除殘花的人的人人物 (單數) (空)
deadhead.ex: You must deadhead the_roses to grow.

deadlight.def: (船)舷窗遮板、固定舷窗人物 (單數) (窗)

deadline.def: 截止日期、最後期限人物 (單數) (限)
deadline.col: meet a deadline, set a deadline, miss a deadline
deadline.ex: We must work hard to meet the_deadline.

deadliness.ex: The_extreme deadliness of poison is key.

deadlock.def: 僵局、停頓人物、使停頓的人的人人物 (單數) (僵)
deadlock.ex: The_talks have reached a total deadlock.

deadly.def: 致命的、極度的的人的人物 (毒)
deadly.col: deadly weapon, deadly poison, deadly serious
deadly.ex: He was deadly serious about his plans.

deadpan.def: 面無表情的人的人物、無表情地的人物 (單數) (冷)
deadpan.ex: He delivered the_joke in a deadpan way.

deadshot.ex: He was a famous deadshot in the_west.

deadwood.def: 枯木、累贅的人或物人物 (單數) (木)
deadwood.ex: We need to clear out the_local deadwood.

deaf.col: deaf to advice, turn a deaf ear (置若罔聞)
deaf.ex: He turned a deaf ear to my local pleas.

deafen.ex: The_loud sound manage to deafen us.

deafening.def: 震耳欲聾的、淹沒的人 (或物) (響)
deafening.ex: There was a deafening applause at end.

deafly.ex: He sat there deafly as I yelled to him.

deaf-mute.def: 聾啞人、聾啞的人的人物 (啞)
deaf-mute.ex: They used signs for the_deaf-mute boy.

deafness.def: 耳聾、不願聽人物 (單數) (聾)
deafness.ex: He suffers from a total partial deafness.

deal.def: 交易、份量、對待、分牌的人的人人物 (單數) (交/對)
deal.col: a great deal, big deal, deal with, raw deal (不公待遇)
deal.ex: That project was a very big deal to me.

dealer.def: 商人、業者、發牌者人物 (單數) (商)
dealer.col: car dealer, antique dealer, drug dealer
dealer.ex: The_antique dealer sold me a rare map.

dealership.def: 代理權、經銷商人物 (單數) (權)
dealership.ex: He works at a local car dealership.

dealing.def: 行為、交易、對待的人 (或物) (交)
dealing.ex: The_firm is guilty of double dealing.

dean.def: 院長、教務長、主任牧師人物 (單數) (長)

deanship.ex: He held the_lengthy deanship for years.

dear.def: 親愛的、昂貴的、哎呀的人的人物 (單數) (親/貴)
dear.col: oh dear, dear friend, hold dear
dear.ex: These are things that I hold very dear.

dearly.ex: He paid dearly for his bad mistakes.

dearth.def: 缺乏、糧食不足、饑荒人物 (單數) (缺)
dearth.ex: There is a dearth of information on it.

deary/dearie.ex: Listen deary, don't worry about them.

death.def: 死亡、毀滅、死神人物 (單數) (死)
death.col: death penalty, put to death, sick to death of (厭煩)
death.ex: I am sick to death of his local lies.

death-bed.def: 臨終之床、臨死之時人物 (單數) (終)
death-bed.ex: He made a death-bed confession today.

deathblow.def: 致命一擊、毀滅的人物 (單數) (擊)
deathblow.ex: High debt dealt a deathblow to the_firm.

death-cup.def: (植)毒鵝膏、致命毒菇人物 (單數) (菇)
death-cup.ex: The_death-cup is a very poisonous mushroom.

death-duty.ex: He had to pay a large death-duty now.

deathless.def: 不死的、永恆的的人的人物 (單數) (永)

deathly.def: 死一般的、致命地的人的人物 (單數) (死)
deathly.ex: A deathly silence filled the_old room.

deathmask.ex: They made a plaster deathmask of poet.

death-trap.def: 死亡陷阱、危險的場所人物 (單數) (陷)
death-trap.ex: That bridge is an absolute death-trap.

death-warrant.def: 死刑執行令、破滅之兆人物 (單數) (令)

death-watch.def: 守靈、(蟲)報死蟲人物 (單數) (守)
death-watch.ex: They sat death-watch by the_old king.

debacle.def: 大災難、崩潰、慘敗人物 (單數) (慘)
debacle.ex: The_plan ended in a total debacle.

debar.def: 阻礙、排除、禁止的人的人
debar.ex: They want to debar him from the_office.

debark.def: 登陸、上岸的人物、登陸的人的人人物 (單數) (登)
debark.ex: The_troops prepare to debark at dawn.

debarkation.ex: They arrived at the_port of debarkation.

debase.def: 貶低、降低品質、貶值的人的人
debase.ex: War will often debase the_local currency.

debasement.def: 貶低、墮落的人物 (單數) (低)
debasement.ex: The_moral debasement of society is sad.

debatable/debateable.ex: It's a very debatable point indeed.

debate.def: 辯論、爭論、考慮的人的人人物 (單數) (辯)
debate.col: under debate, open to debate, heated debate
debate.ex: The_issue is currently under local debate.

debater.def: 辯論者、討論者人物 (單數) (辯)
debater.ex: He is a very skilled and loud debater.

debauch.def: 敗壞、放蕩的人物、誘惑的人的人人物 (單數) (敗)
debauch.ex: Bad books can debauch the_local youth.

debauched.def: 墮落的、放蕩的的人的人 (或物) (墮)
debauched.ex: He lived a very wild and debashed life.

debaucher.ex: He was a very evil and greedy debaucher.

debauchery.ex: He ruined himself with local debauchery.

debenture.ex: The_firm issued a new corporate debenture.

debilitate.ex: Stress can help to debilitate health.

debility.ex: He suffers from extreme physical debility.

debit.def: 借方、借記人物、記入借方的人的人人物 (單數) (借)
debit.ex: Please use my debit card for the_bill.

debonair.ex: He has a very debonair and cool manner.

debouch.ex: The_river began to debouch into the_sea.

debrief.def: 盤問、彙報的人物、聽取汇报的人的人人物 (單數) (彙)
debrief.ex: They need to debrief the_pilot properly.

debris.ex: The_yard was full of scattered debris.

debt.col: in debt, bad debt, national debt, pay off debt
debt.ex: He is deeply in debt to the_local bank.

debtor.def: 債務人、借方人物 (單數) (債)

debug.ex: He spent all day trying to debug code.

debunk.def: 揭穿、拆穿假面具的人的人
debunk.ex: He tried to debunk the_local ghost myth.

debut.def: 初次登台、開張的人物、初次登場的人的人人物 (單數) (初)
debut.ex: Her debut album was a very big hit.

debutante.def: 初出社交界的女孩人物 (單數) (女)
debutante.ex: The_young debutante was very shy today.

decade.ex: A lot has changed in the_past decade.

decadence.ex: He was shocked by the_moral decadence.

decadent.def: 墮落的、衰廢的人的人物 (單數) (墮)
decadent.ex: He led a very rich and decadent life.

decagon.def: (幾)十角形、十邊形人物 (單數) (十)
decagon.ex: The_floor tiles had a decagon shape.

decalcify.def: 脫鈣、使骨質軟化的人的人
decalcify.ex: Acid can help to decalcify the_local bone.

decalogue.def: 摩西十誡、基本規律人物 (單數) (誡)
decalogue.ex: He tried to follow the_ancient decalogue.

decamp.def: 撤營、(祕密)逃走的人的人
decamp.ex: He decided to decamp with all the_gold.

decanal.def: 院長的、助祭位之左的人的人物 (單數) (院)
decanal.ex: He sat in the_decanal stall in church.

decant.def: 輕輕倒出、傾注的人的人

decanter.def: 玻璃移注瓶人物 (單數) (瓶)
decanter.ex: He poured wine from a crystal decanter.

decapitate.def: 斬首、處死的人物、斬首的人的人人物 (單數) (斬)

decapitation.ex: Public decapitation was very cruel then.

decapod.def: 十足類動物的人的人物 (單數) (十)
decapod.ex: The_crab is a marine decapod animal.

decarboxylize/decarboxylise.ex: Heat can help to decarboxylize it now.

decathlon.def: 十項全能運動人物 (單數) (十)
decathlon.ex: He won the_gold medal in the_decathlon.

decay.def: 腐朽、衰退、使腐爛的人的人人物 (單數) (腐)
decay.col: tooth decay, moral decay, radioactive decay
decay.ex: Sugar is the_main cause of tooth decay.

decayed.def: 腐爛的、衰微的人的人 (或物) (腐)
decayed.ex: The_old house has a very decayed look.

decease.def: 死亡、卒的人物、卒的人的人人物 (單數) (卒)
decease.ex: The_property passed on his late decease.

deceased.def: 已故的、死者的人的人 (或物) (故)
deceased.ex: The_deceased was a very well-known man.

deceit.ex: He was a man completely without deceit.

deceitful.ex: He has a very deceitful and mean nature.

deceive.ex: Don't deceive yourself into thinking so.

deceiver.ex: He is a very cunning and loud deceiver.

decency.def: 得體、體面、禮貌人物 (單數) (得)
decency.ex: It's just common decency to apologize.

decennial.def: 十年的、每十年的的人的人物 (單數) (十)
decennial.ex: They held a big decennial celebration.
